steps.title: Substitute the value x = 2
steps.content: We start with $$40x+20y=160$$. Substituting $x=2$ gives $$40(2)+20y=160$$. Simplify the product: $$80+20y=160$$.

steps.title: Solve for y
steps.content: From $$80+20y=160$$, subtract 80 from both sides: $$20y=80$$. Divide both sides by 20: $$y=4$$. Therefore, Yesenia purchased 4 shirts, and the substituted equation checks because $80+20(4)=160$. B is correct.
